approval_gates.name: Sensitive-data review before model context use

escalation_rules.name: Escalate records missing source-system identifiers
escalation_rules.condition: Source-system identifier is missing, ambiguous, or conflicting.
escalation_rules.required_action: Manual review before closure or resolution.

escalation_rules.name: Escalate approval-threshold exceptions
escalation_rules.condition: Exception exceeds threshold or requires supervisor approval.
escalation_rules.required_action: Supervisor must approve or reject recommended resolution.

escalation_rules.condition: Exception exceeds threshold or requires supervisor approval.
